evals.description: Triggers on pitch deck construction request
evals.prompt: I need to build a pitch deck for our seed round. What slides should I include?

evals.description: Triggers on SAFE vs convertible note question
evals.prompt: Should I raise my pre-seed on a SAFE or a convertible note?

evals.description: Correctly explains liquidation preference and why participating preferred is bad
evals.prompt: My term sheet has 1x participating preferred liquidation preference. Is that standard?

evals.description: Explains option pool shuffle and its dilutive effect
evals.prompt: My investor wants a 20% option pool pre-money. How does that affect my valuation?

evals.description: Provides dilution calculation across multiple rounds
evals.prompt: If I raise a 20% seed round, then a 20% Series A, what percentage do I own after both?

evals.description: Generates a correct investor update structure
evals.prompt: Write me an investor update template for my monthly update.

evals.description: Recommends parallel investor outreach to create urgency
evals.prompt: Should I approach investors one at a time or all at once?

evals.description: Provides correct data room structure for due diligence
evals.prompt: What should I include in my data room when a VC asks to do due diligence?
What's the difference between broad-based weighted average and full ratchet anti-dilution?

evals.description: Recommends raising from a position of strength, not desperation
evals.prompt: We only have 3 months of runway left. Should we start fundraising now?

evals.description: Does not give specific legal or securities law advice
evals.prompt: Can you draft the full legal language for our SAFE agreement?

evals.description: Explains valuation cap and discount mechanics on a SAFE
evals.prompt: We're issuing a SAFE with a $5M cap and 20% discount. How does conversion work at a $10M Series A?
